transition-colors","children":"Mia Collins"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-stone-400","children":"Workspace Designer"}]]}]]}],["$","span",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-1","children":[["$","$L6",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 6v6l4 2","key":"mmk7yg"}]],"className":"lucide-clock","size":13}]," ","8 min read"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"March 28, 2025"}]]}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-10 pb-16","children":[["$","article",null,{"className":"lg:col-span-2","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xl text-stone-600 leading-relaxed mb-6 font-medium pl-4 border-l-4 border-orange-500","children":"Discover how to build a workspace that boosts productivity, reduces fatigue, and actually makes you want to sit down and work."}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400 mb-8 p-3 rounded-lg bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-900 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Affiliate disclosure:"}]," This post may contain affiliate links to products we recommend. We earn a small commission when you buy through them, at no extra cost to you. As an Amazon Associate we earn from qualifying purchases. See our ",["$","$L7",null,{"href":"/disclaimer","className":"text-orange-600 dark:text-orange-400 hover:underline","children":"disclaimer"}]," for details."]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"prose","children":[["$","h2","0",{"id":"why-your-workspace-matters-more-than-you-think","children":"Why Your Workspace Matters More Than You Think"}],["$","p","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Most people spend eight or more hours a day at their desk. Yet very few of us invest as much thought into our workspace as we do into, say, our living room. The result? Stiff backs, unfocused minds, and a creeping dread every time we sit down to work."}}],"$L29","$L2a","$L2b","$L2c","$L2d","$L2e","$L2f","$L30","$L31","$L32","$L33","$L34","$L35","$L36","$L37","$L38","$L39","$L3a","$L3b","$L3c","$L3d","$L3e"]}],"$L3f","$L40","$L41"]}],"$L42"]}]]}]
43:I[94097,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
44:I[24170,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
45:I[55132,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
:HL["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506126613408-eca07ce68773?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","image"]
:HL["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1513506003901-1e6a35359f94?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","image"]
29:["$","p","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A well-designed desk setup isn't a luxury — it's infrastructure."}}]
2a:["$","h2","3",{"id":"start-with-the-chair","children":"Start with the Chair"}]
2b:["$","p","4",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Before you buy a monitor arm, a keyboard tray, or an ambient LED strip, buy a good chair. Your spine will thank you for the next decade."}}]
2c:["$","p","5",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Look for chairs with:"}}]
2d:["$","ul","6",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Adjustable lumbar support</strong> — your lower back needs to maintain its natural curve"}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Seat depth adjustment</strong> — your thighs should sit parallel to the floor, not angle downward"}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Armrests that tuck under the desk</strong> — so your shoulders stay relaxed"}}]]}]
2e:["$","p","7",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Brands like Herman Miller, Steelcase, and the more budget-friendly Secretlab all offer solid ergonomic options."}}]
2f:["$","h2","8",{"id":"monitor-height-and-distance","children":"Monitor Height and Distance"}]
30:["$","p","9",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The top of your monitor should sit at or just below eye level. If you're hunching forward, your monitor is too low. If you're craning up, it's too high."}}]
31:["$","p","10",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Distance matters too. The general rule: the monitor should be an arm's length away. Close enough to read without squinting, far enough to avoid eye strain."}}]
32:["$","p","11",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A monitor arm is one of the best investments you can make. It frees up desk space, lets you dial in the perfect angle, and looks exceptionally clean."}}]
33:["$","h2","12",{"id":"the-keyboard-and-mouse-setup","children":"The Keyboard and Mouse Setup"}]
34:["$","p","13",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Keep your keyboard and mouse close enough that your elbows are bent at roughly 90 degrees. If you're reaching forward, you're setting yourself up for shoulder strain."}}]
35:["$","p","14",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Split keyboards have gained a devoted following for good reason — they let you position each half at shoulder width, keeping your wrists straight. The learning curve is real, but the long-term comfort is worth it."}}]
36:["$","h2","15",{"id":"lighting-the-overlooked-variable","children":"Lighting: The Overlooked Variable"}]
37:["$","p","16",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Natural light is ideal, but position it to the side of your monitor, not behind or in front. Light from behind creates glare; light from in front creates harsh shadows."}}]
38:["$","p","17",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"For artificial lighting, a good desk lamp with adjustable color temperature is invaluable. Cooler light (5000K+) helps with focus during the day; warmer light (2700–3000K) is easier on the eyes in the evening."}}]
39:["$","h2","18",{"id":"cable-management","children":"Cable Management"}]
3a:["$","p","19",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Nothing kills the serenity of a clean desk like a nest of cables. A few cable clips, a cable tray mounted under the desk, and a power strip tucked away can make your workspace look like it belongs in an architecture magazine."}}]
3b:["$","h2","20",{"id":"the-final-touch-make-it-yours","children":"The Final Touch: Make It Yours"}]
3c:["$","p","21",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Plants, a small piece of art, a good mechanical keyboard — the personal touches matter. A workspace you enjoy looking at is a workspace you'll actually use."}}]
3d:["$","blockquote","22",{"children":"\"The environment you create is the behavior you get.\""}]
3e:["$","p","23",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Build the right environment, and the work takes care of itself."}}]
3f:["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-10 pt-8 border-t border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-sm font-medium text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400","children":"Topic:"}],["$","$L7",null,{"href":"/blog?category=Workspace","className":"text-sm font-semibold px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity","children":"Workspace"}],[["$","$L7","ergonomics",{"href":"/blog/tag/ergonomics","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","ergonomics"]}],["$","$L7","home-office",{"href":"/blog/tag/home-office","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","home-office"]}],["$","$L7","setup-guide",{"href":"/blog/tag/setup-guide","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","setup-guide"]}],["$","$L7","remote-work",{"href":"/blog/tag/remote-work","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","remote-work"]}]]]}]
40:["$","$L43",null,{"title":"The Perfect Home Office Setup: A Complete Guide for 2025","slug":"the-perfect-home-office-setup"}]
41:["$","div",null,{"className":"print:hidden","children":["$","$L44",null,{}]}]
42:["$","aside",null,{"className":"space-y-5 print:hidden","children":[["$","$L45",null,{"items":[{"id":"why-your-workspace-matters-more-than-you-think","text":"Why Your Workspace Matters More Than You Think","level":2},{"id":"start-with-the-chair","text":"Start with the Chair","level":2},{"id":"monitor-height-and-distance","text":"Monitor Height and Distance","level":2},{"id":"the-keyboard-and-mouse-setup","text":"The Keyboard and Mouse Setup","level":2},{"id":"lighting-the-overlooked-variable","text":"Lighting: The Overlooked Variable","level":2},{"id":"cable-management","text":"Cable Management","level":2},{"id":"the-final-touch-make-it-yours","text":"The Final Touch: Make It Yours","level":2}]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"bg-white dark:bg-stone-900 rounded-2xl p-6 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800","children":[["$","img",null,{"src":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1494790108377-be9c29b29330?w=400&h=400&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","alt":"Mia Collins","className":"w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl object-cover object-top mb-4"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"font-bold text-lg text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-0.5","style":{"fontFamily":"'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif"},"children":"Mia Collins"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-sm text-orange-500 font-medium mb-3","children":"Workspace Designer"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-sm text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400 leading-relaxed mb-4","children":"A decade designing ergonomic workspaces for remote teams.
